affected_pattern: Sporadic NULL TotalCharges accompanied by mediation-layer parse warnings about unexpected field types
root_cause: Network element vendor pushed an optional billing record field as integer instead of string — mediation's lax parser accepted the event but emitted the amount field as NULL when the downstream rating lookup failed.
supporting_evidence: Billing Record Failure RCA Playbook: Vendor-Optional-Field Type Drift pattern
Vendor release notes show field type change for optional attribute
Mediation parse-warning counter correlates exactly with NULL record count
recommended_action: Update the mediation parser to coerce the field back to string
Replay the affected billing records through the fixed parser
Make the parser strict mode the default and quarantine type-drift events
Require vendors to announce billing record-schema changes via a contract test
